evidence.claim: Built semantic search feature for internal knowledge base of ~500K documents
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents.

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup, validated through human relevance judgments.

evidence.claim: Technical stack: sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, bge-base), FAISS, Elasticsearch, Kubeflow, Python, OpenCV, LangChain, Milvus, TensorFlow, Weights & Biases
evidence.source_text: Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS... Skills: Kubeflow, Python, Elasticsearch, OpenCV, LangChain, Milvus, Weights & Biases, TensorFlow

evidence.claim: Shipped first RAG-based feature and owns the evaluation framework
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Completed LangChain for LLM Application Development (2022) and NLP Specialization (2018)
evidence.source_text: Certifications: LangChain for LLM Application Development (DeepLearning.AI, 2022); NLP Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2018)

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks for model deployment
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over theoretical background
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
